description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and accented with red shutters on the windows. The house features a gable roof with a large attached garage on the right side and a paved driveway leading up to it. The front yard is landscaped with several trees and a tiled walkway, while the backyard includes a wooden deck and a swimming pool. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding. The property is bordered by a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The overall design is reminiscent of a Colonial Revival style, blending traditional and modern suburban elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, red shutters, a front porch with columns, attached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, columns, red shutters, garage, driveway, and front yard trees.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard pool and deck.
description_view_2: Backyard view featuring the wooden deck, swimming pool, and rear facade with more windows and trees.
description_view_3: Side view showing the house's depth, the pool, deck, and the transition between front and back yards.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, white columns, steps, and decorative red shutters.
